members.name: GetHeight
members.summary: Returns the light's height, which is used in 2D normal mapping. See [member PointLight2D.height] and [member DirectionalLight2D.height].

members.name: SetHeight
members.summary: Sets the light's height, which is used in 2D normal mapping. See [member PointLight2D.height] and [member DirectionalLight2D.height].

members.name: EditorOnly
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], Light2D will only appear when editing the scene.

members.name: Energy
members.summary: The Light2D's energy value. The larger the value, the stronger the light.

members.name: RangeItemCullMask
members.summary: The layer mask. Only objects with a matching [member CanvasItem.light_mask] will be affected by the Light2D. See also [member shadow_item_cull_mask], which affects which objects can cast shadows. [b]Note:[/b] [member range_item_cull_mask] is ignored by [DirectionalLight2D], which will always light a 2D node regardless of the 2D node's [member CanvasItem.light_mask].

members.name: RangeLayerMax
members.summary: Maximum layer value of objects that are affected by the Light2D.

members.name: RangeLayerMin
members.summary: Minimum layer value of objects that are affected by the Light2D.

members.name: RangeZMax
members.summary: Maximum [code]z[/code] value of objects that are affected by the Light2D.

members.name: RangeZMin
members.summary: Minimum [code]z[/code] value of objects that are affected by the Light2D.

members.name: ShadowColor
members.summary: [Color] of shadows cast by the Light2D.

members.name: ShadowEnabled
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the Light2D will cast shadows.

members.name: ShadowFilterSmooth
members.summary: Smoothing value for shadows. Higher values will result in softer shadows, at the cost of visible streaks that can appear in shadow rendering. [member shadow_filter_smooth] only has an effect if [member shadow_filter] is [constant SHADOW_FILTER_PCF5] or [constant SHADOW_FILTER_PCF13].

members.name: ShadowItemCullMask
members.summary: The shadow mask. Used with [LightOccluder2D] to cast shadows. Only occluders with a matching [member CanvasItem.light_mask] will cast shadows. See also [member range_item_cull_mask], which affects which objects can [i]receive[/i] the light.

values.name: BLEND_MODE_ADD
values.summary: Adds the value of pixels corresponding to the Light2D to the values of pixels under it. This is the common behavior of a light.

values.name: BLEND_MODE_MIX
values.summary: Mix the value of pixels corresponding to the Light2D to the values of pixels under it by linear interpolation.

values.name: BLEND_MODE_SUB
values.summary: Subtracts the value of pixels corresponding to the Light2D to the values of pixels under it, resulting in inversed light effect.

values.name: SHADOW_FILTER_NONE
values.summary: No filter applies to the shadow map. This provides hard shadow edges and is the fastest to render. See [member shadow_filter].

values.name: SHADOW_FILTER_PCF13
values.summary: Percentage closer filtering (13 samples) applies to the shadow map. This is the slowest shadow filtering mode, and should be used sparingly. See [member shadow_filter].

values.name: SHADOW_FILTER_PCF5
values.summary: Percentage closer filtering (5 samples) applies to the shadow map. This is slower compared to hard shadow rendering. See [member shadow_filter].

constants.name: SHADOW_FILTER_NONE
constants.summary: No filter applies to the shadow map. This provides hard shadow edges and is the fastest to render. See [member shadow_filter].

constants.name: SHADOW_FILTER_PCF5
constants.summary: Percentage closer filtering (5 samples) applies to the shadow map. This is slower compared to hard shadow rendering. See [member shadow_filter].

constants.name: SHADOW_FILTER_PCF13
constants.summary: Percentage closer filtering (13 samples) applies to the shadow map. This is the slowest shadow filtering mode, and should be used sparingly. See [member shadow_filter].

constants.name: BLEND_MODE_ADD
constants.summary: Adds the value of pixels corresponding to the Light2D to the values of pixels under it. This is the common behavior of a light.

constants.name: BLEND_MODE_SUB
constants.summary: Subtracts the value of pixels corresponding to the Light2D to the values of pixels under it, resulting in inversed light effect.

constants.name: BLEND_MODE_MIX
constants.summary: Mix the value of pixels corresponding to the Light2D to the values of pixels under it by linear interpolation.
